Home.name: Cuong (Henry) Nguyen
Home.tagline: AI Engineer · Vibration-Based Fault Diagnosis & Edge AI
Home.bio: Mechatronics graduate from Hanoi University of Science and Technology. Currently a PHM researcher at HUST and a backend developer at Aladin. My Master's research focuses on fault diagnosis of Planetary Roller Screws using Digital Twin and Transfer Learning, combining analytical modeling, FEA simulation and deep learning. On the engineering side I build Aladata, a Vietnamese conversational Text-to-SQL system where I own the Memory layer and the FastAPI service. Outside of work I ship small AI-powered indie projects.

About.title: Contact
About.intro: The fastest way to reach me is by email. I'm also active on the platforms below.

Skills.title: Skills
Skills.researchList: Signal Processing for Fault Detection, Vibration Analysis, PHM, RUL Prediction, Explainable AI, Transfer Learning
